DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: JOSEPH JEDEIKIN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, HEBREW ACADEMY OF SAN FRANCISCO. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ORDER IMPOSING TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ORDER TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT ORDERS COMPLIANCE WITH THE PRIOR ORDER ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 4, 2005. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $450, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUEMNTS AND FORM INTERROGATORIES, FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS --- CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 12, 2004 AT 10:30 A.M. PER STIPULATION AND ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: ANDREW SCHNEIDER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, HEBREW ACADEMY OF SAN FRANCISCO. ANTHONY HEAD, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING. MOTION ARGUED. RULING OF COURT AFTER HEARING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS A SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE FAILURE TO RESPOND TIMELY TO THAT INTERROGATORY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND ITS COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $450, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
NOTICE OF RULING
